label: Transparent lupine flower spike motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Lupine transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a complete lupine flower spike motif for a design-system catalog, isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A single alpine meadow lupine flower spike with accurate botanical structure: vertical raceme of layered blue-violet pea-shaped blossoms, small unopened buds near the tip, palmate leaf green foliage at the base, slender silver-green stem, natural petal veins and alpine daylight detail. Crisp opaque edges, no cast shadow.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; full flower spike visible from leaves to tip; do not crop the subject.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light with silver alpine clarity that preserves blue-violet petals, leaf green foliage, and subtle silver stem highlights.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Text: no text.
Constraints: no vase, no hand, no meadow landscape, no butterflies, no props, no second flower spike, no watermark, no transparent checkerboard.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Lupine light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named Morphous Lupine, derived from the visible lupine flower spike cutout.
Reference use: Use the lupine image in context as the source of truth. Extract the vertical modular rhythm of the flower spike, blue-violet petal actions, leaf-green success states, silver alpine light, pale meadow surfaces, and botanical vein texture. The system mood is modular education UI: course dashboards, learning paths, lesson cards, assessment tables, and classroom admin tools.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source, target 3840x2160 if available, at least 2400px wide. Use a clean grid with large readable labels.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Lupine", motif story "Lupine Flower Spike", Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, lesson cards, course cards, navigation sidebar, top nav, breadcrumbs, command palette, search field, dashboard metrics, progress charts, assessment table, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, token swatches, texture samples, spacing scale, 8px radius examples, border and shadow examples.
Typography: English product UI plus Japanese guidance using readable Gothic UI examples; include short Japanese labels such as 学習, 課題, 進捗, 成績.
Style/medium: polished premium product design-system presentation, precise modular grid, shadcn-compatible controls, tactile paper and petal texture accents, calm alpine education interface.
Color palette: motif-derived blue violet, leaf green, silver, alpine white, slate ink, muted lavender, and soft meadow neutrals. Avoid unrelated saturated colors.
Text: short readable UI labels only.
Constraints: no generic purple gradient kit, no one-note blue/purple palette, no tiny illegible token tables, no random brand names, no misspelling of Morphous Lupine, no watermark.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Lupine dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board for Morphous Lupine. It must feel like the completed light board translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible lupine motif and the light Morphous Lupine board in context as references. Preserve the vertical modular spike rhythm, blue-violet petal primary actions, leaf-green success states, silver alpine highlights, lavender muted controls, and modular education UI language.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source, target 3840x2160 if available, at least 2400px wide. Use a precise grid with large readable labels.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Lupine", "Dark Mode", motif story "Lupine Flower Spike", Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, lesson cards, course cards, navigation sidebar, top nav, breadcrumbs, command palette, search field, dashboard metrics, progress charts, assessment table, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, token swatches, texture samples, spacing scale, 8px radius examples, border and shadow examples.
Typography: English product UI plus Japanese guidance using readable Gothic UI examples; include short Japanese labels such as 学習, 課題, 進捗, 成績.
Visual details: deep lupine ink background, slate-violet panels, blue-violet active states, leaf-green positive feedback, silver alpine dividers and focus rings, subtle petal vein textures, restrained contrast suitable for education dashboards.
Text: short readable UI labels only.
Constraints: no neon overload, no generic black UI, no unrelated saturated colors, no tiny illegible text, no random brand names, no misspelling of Morphous Lupine, no watermark.
